note.FR: Portee de competence +72%. Arme signature pour maximiser la conversion Portee → Degats.
note.EN: Skill Range +72%. Signature weapon to maximize Range-to-Damage conversion.

note.FR: Augmente la Portee et fournit des fleches traqueuses avec buff d'Intensite.
note.EN: Boosts Skill Range and provides tracking arrows with Skill Intensity buff.

note.FR: 6x Scorch pour maximiser les degats. Noyau Esquive. Tolerance augmente au niv. +5.
note.EN: 6x Scorch to maximize damage. Sidestep core. Tolerance increases at +5.

note.FR: Support polyvalent. Augmente les degats et apporte du controle.
note.EN: Versatile support. Boosts team damage and provides crowd control.

note.FR: Soins et recuperation de Lucidite. Indispensable avant Intron 6.
note.EN: Healing and Sanity recovery. Essential before Intron 6.

note.FR: Augmente les degats infliges et renforce les debuffs.
note.EN: Increases damage dealt and enhances debuffs.

note.FR: Augmente la probabilite de generer Eclipse Solaire ou Chasse Lunaire.
note.EN: Increases probability of generating Solar Eclipse or Lunar Hunt.

note.FR: Active le Rite Funeraire qui convertit l'exces de Portee en Degats.
note.EN: Activates Funeral Rite converting excess Skill Range into Skill Damage.

notes.FR: Lady Nifle depend de la gestion de la Lucidite avant Intron 6. A I6, les armes a distance declenchent Chasse Lunaire/Eclipse Solaire. Requiem de la Mer Brumeuse convertit l'exces de Portee en Degats de competence. Focus Probabilite de declenchement sur les armes a distance.
notes.EN: Lady Nifle depends on Sanity management before Intron 6. At I6, ranged weapons trigger Lunar Hunt/Solar Eclipse. Misty Sea Requiem converts excess Skill Range into Skill Damage. Build Trigger Probability on ranged weapons.
